api_key.description: News API (newsapi.org) API key. Sent as the X-Api-Key header on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: News API base URL override; defaults to production.

search_query.description: Free-text query (`q` param) for the everything and top-headlines streams.

search_in.description: Comma-separated fields to restrict the everything search to (`searchIn`): title, description, content.

sources.description: Comma-separated News API source identifiers to restrict the everything/top-headlines streams to.

domains.description: Comma-separated domains to restrict the everything search to.

exclude_domains.description: Comma-separated domains to exclude from the everything search.

language.description: 2-letter ISO-639-1 language code to restrict the everything/top-headlines/sources streams to.

sort_by.description: Sort order for the everything search: relevancy, popularity, or publishedAt.

start_date.description: Oldest article publish date/time (`from`) for the everything search. Also used as the incremental sync start when no cursor state exists yet.

end_date.description: Newest article publish date/time (`to`) for the everything search.

country.description: 2-letter ISO 3166-1 country code for the top-headlines/sources streams.

category.description: News category for the top-headlines/sources streams: business, entertainment, general, health, science, sports, technology.
